name: Dialog
import: import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription } from '@/components/ui/dialog'
description: M3 dialog built on Radix. Uses rounded-xl (28px) corners, surface-container-high background, and scrim overlay. Action buttons aligned to the right in a row.
example: Confirm action This action cannot be undone.
never: Never build custom modals -- use Dialog from Radix
Never forget DialogTitle -- required for accessibility
Never use box shadows on dialogs -- M3 dialogs use surface-container-high with scrim overlay
Never use sharp corners on dialogs -- M3 uses 28px (rounded-[28px]) border radius
